summary: Unknown‑source recording of a late‑era show that shines on the tail end, especially Foolish Heart into New Speedway Boogie.
review: Although the reviewer isn’t usually a fan of the later era, this May 1991 performance stands out, with the ending stretch from Foolish Heart through New Speedway Boogie receiving particular praise. Hornsby’s keyboard presence is noted for prompting the veteran members to bring their A‑game. No specific comments on recording fidelity were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 4‑star review highlights strong musical moments but gives no information about the audio source, leading to a solid yet cautious rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention any aspects of sound clarity, mix balance, or other technical details.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The latter portion of the concert is singled out as a highlight, with Hornsby’s playing energizing the band and delivering an especially compelling finish.

band_member_comments.Keys: Hornsby goads the old guard into showing their stuff.
